name: playground-claude-plugins-public
description: Creates interactive HTML playgrounds — self-contained single-file explorers that let users configure something visually through controls, see a live preview, and copy out a prompt.
intent_triggers: 我需要處理 playground 相關工作
幫我啟用 playground 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 playground

task.description: Natural-language task or instruction for the agent skill.

context_path.description: Optional workspace path or file context for the skill.

examples.intent: Use the playground skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
